sections.paragraph:
(f. of the word רְעוּ i.q. רֵעֶה, רֵעַ, of the form כְּלִי=כֵּלֶה, מְתוּ=מֶת a man; from the root רָעָה No. 3).

(1) a female companion, friend, Est 1:19 Exo 11:2 preceded by אִשָּׁה altera, altera, one, another, Isa 34:15, 16 Isa 34:16 Jer 9:19.

(2) desire, study of any thing. רְעוּת רוּחַ a vain pursuit, Ecc 1:14 2:11 , 17 , 26 4:4 , 6:9 compare רָעָה רוּחַ Hos 12:2, and Chald. רְעוּת.

רעות

Chald. will, Ezr 5:17 7:18 from the root רָעָה No. 3.
